scripts.build: npm run build -w web && npm run build -w api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w web && npm run typecheck -w api
scripts.start:api:express: node node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && node apps/api/dist/src/expressServer.js
